list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), COUNT(*) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT f.event_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo, s.site_type::text AS site_type, s.description AS site, f.execunitid AS monitoring_point, f.event_start_timestamp, f.event_end_timestamp, ROUND((COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))::numeric,4) AS energy_wh, ROUND(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0),4) AS cfp_g, f.status FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') ORDER BY f.event_start_timestamp DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500;
